div.head: The Minister in Rumania (Wilson) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 13. Legation’s despatch 412, April 17th.Not printed. Secretary General, Foreign Office informs me that in accordance with law voted by Parliament proposals will shortly be made for exchange of notes providing for indefinite extension of time for negotiation of commercial treaties not yet concluded. Not even preliminary study of American draft proposal has yet begun and I anticipate no action before late autumn owing to slow progress in negotiations now in progress with neighboring and European countries.
